title: PND's Skyblock Pack
description: PND's Skyblock Modpack is a mod pack for the popular game Hypixel Skyblock. Its a performance and utility based modpack to help with getting FPS on the latest version(s) while maintaining those beautiful mods that you see on 1.8!
body:
**THIS IS SPECIFICALLY FOR HYPIXEL SKYBLOCK.**

If you're someone who wants to play skyblock on 1.21.4 and don't know what mods to get then look no further! Here I add mods I think would be useful for everyday skyblock and personal needs.

This is currently a WIP Skyblock pack for new mods that come out and texture packs i think would be nice!

BTW: This modpack is made to be DIY so everything is going to be jungled up, if you would like me to make a custom config to make everything more clean and organized join my discord and make it a suggestion!
